schema.title: DinkVision data lineage and utilization ledger

policy_directives.license_fyi_directive: Owner directive 2026-07-22: internal use has no licensing constraints; license metadata is FYI only and never determines ledger state. Protected-eval and compare-only restrictions remain protocol quarantines.

COURT.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may support preview experiments; teacher keypoints are not GT.

EVENT.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may train; predictions are teacher-only and audio alone cannot establish eligibility.

PERSON.ruling: Ten non-holdout pixels may train; three compare-only videos may only form the judge.

REID.ruling: Teacher crop use requires manual precision gate; three compare-only videos are judge-only.

named_findings.interpretation: od8al precision -0.1924 (F1 -0.0842) LOSS, hemel_test F1 +0.046 WIN. Because the mixed arm had 13.5x more gradient updates and 6.75x more anchor exposure, the result cannot distinguish harmful pseudo-labels, update-count overfit, or anchor-repetition overfit.

assets.state_reason: The preregistered both-families-nonnegative bar failed under an under-controlled exposure design; verified=false and do_not_promote=true.
assets.next_check: Any future rerun must be exposure-matched with equal steps and matched pseudo-loss caps; do not threshold-tune this result.
